review_title: Secure and versatile platform that facilitates connection of IoT devices
description: This is a platform that eliminates the possibility of data loss in the exchange processes. EMQX offers high security and performance in the data exchange process.
author: Derek W.
pros: In our company it is necessary to maintain a communicative process at the height of our business processes, with EMQX we have achieved a fluid exchange of information through the use of IoT messaging. It is an easy to use and very secure platform. It allows you to connect to a wide variety of cloud services, which generates a lot of flexibility. It allows quick access from anywhere and at any time.
cons: I have not found anything negative about the operation of this platform, it has provided many advantages to our communication processes.

review_title: Great platform to buy IOT MQTT
description: It's reasonable and adequate, especially when compared to other available platforms.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I'd say EMQX offers consumers a variety of adaptable MQTT alternatives, is dependable and effective, and helps maintain data security.
cons: I don't think there is a feature that is either not useful or not functioning properly, in my perspective.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Priyanshu S.
pros: the most I like is there user interface and how they are providing services
cons: there is nothing that I don't like about this software everything is fine

author: Jeremy S.
pros: The software is feature-rich, compliant to spec, performant and easy to set up.
cons: Observability and log/error intelligibility can be lacking sometimes.

review_title: Most reliable and scalable IOT based messaging platform
description: EMQX Enterprise and EMQX cloud both of its services are very helpful for all your needs.
author: Ishan A.
pros: 1. Very reliable IOT service provider which ahas its presence all over the world. 2. It helps you keep your data secure.
cons: 1. I would suggest that it's user interface could be more interactive.

description: Ayudó a conectar bastantes dispositivos IOT en nuestra organización y ayudó a analizar fácilmente sus datos en tiempo real utilizando sus softwares de implementación de back-end.
author: Jesús Esteban F.
pros: Es muy fácil realizar la configuración de la plataforma, lo que evita el tedioso trabajo de reinstalar porque pudo haber quedado mal instalado.
cons: Personalmente está muy bien lograda, no tengo quejas al respecto.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: High performance and scalability for brokers and cloud connectivity.
author: ★ Rodrigo A V.
pros: He has been very helpful in connecting and analysing the performance of data in different IoT devices especially in the cloud, It is highly compatible with AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure among others and one of its great advantages is that it is open source.
cons: It is a very complete software, in the time I have been using it I have not had any problems
